actions.description: Update an existing country targeting rule.

actions.description: Update an existing weather targeting rule.

actions.name: Create Device Rule
actions.description: Create device-based targeting for the current context.

actions.name: Create URL Rule
actions.description: Create URL path targeting.

actions.name: Create UTM Rule
actions.description: Create UTM or referrer targeting.

actions.name: Attach Rule To Variant
actions.description: Attach a rule to a specific variant.

actions.name: Duplicate Rule To Variants
actions.description: Copy a rule to one or more variants.

actions.name: Disable Rule
actions.description: Disable an active targeting rule.

actions.name: Archive Rule
actions.description: Archive a targeting rule.

actions.name: Run Page Audit
actions.description: Audit targeting and visibility for a page or variant.

actions.name: Run Popup Diagnostics
actions.description: Diagnose why a popup may not be firing.

actions.name: Run Rule Diagnostics
actions.description: Diagnose rule eligibility and conflicts.

actions.name: Explain Rule Conflicts
actions.description: Explain overlapping or conflicting rules.

actions.name: Promote Variant
actions.description: Promote a variant to become the primary page version.

actions.name: Clean Up Removed Variant References
actions.description: Remove orphaned rules and references from deleted variants.

actions.name: Reassign Variant Rules
actions.description: Reassign rules after variant promotion or restructuring.

actions.name: Apply Product Country Rule
actions.description: Apply country targeting to a product.

actions.name: Apply Product Weather Rule
actions.description: Apply weather messaging to a product.

actions.name: Recommend Localised Sections
actions.description: Recommend sections to localise based on targeting context.

actions.name: Recommend Variant Structure
actions.description: Recommend variant layout improvements.

ux_rules.title: Localise CTAs for country-specific targeting
ux_rules.description: If a page uses country targeting, check whether CTA copy should reflect the visitor location, currency, delivery options, or availability.
ux_rules.recommendation: Consider localising CTAs where country-specific offers, pricing, delivery, or availability differ.

ux_rules.title: Localise shipping and delivery messages
ux_rules.description: Shipping and returns messaging should be localised when fulfilment differs by visitor country.
ux_rules.recommendation: Create localised delivery and returns messaging for targeted countries.

ux_rules.title: Use weather-based product messaging
ux_rules.description: Weather-sensitive products can benefit from messaging based on current visitor weather.
ux_rules.recommendation: Create weather-specific product messaging for hot, cold, rainy, or snowy conditions.

ux_rules.title: Simplify mobile variants
ux_rules.description: Mobile-only targeting should prioritise short copy, clear CTA visibility, and reduced layout complexity.
ux_rules.recommendation: For mobile-targeted variants, use shorter headings, visible CTAs, and avoid excessive condition stacking.

ux_rules.title: Check popup rule conflict risk
ux_rules.description: Popups with overlapping country, URL, device, UTM, and variant rules are more likely to fail unexpectedly.
ux_rules.recommendation: Run popup diagnostics to identify conflicting or higher-priority rules.

ux_rules.title: Check rules after variant promotion
ux_rules.description: When a variant is promoted, old references may remain attached to previous parent/variant relationships.
ux_rules.recommendation: Check and reassign rules, popups, CTAs, and element references after promoting a variant.

ux_rules.title: Clean up removed variant references
ux_rules.description: Removed variants can leave behind orphaned rules, CTAs, popups, or element references.
ux_rules.recommendation: Disable, delete, or reassign rules and references attached to removed variants.
